holdings.infoBox: THEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 121 individual holdings.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Hedged Equity ETF (THEQ) is an exchange-traded fund. The fund's investment portfolio concentrates primarily on total market equity. THEQ is an actively managed fund-of-funds, investing in US companies of any size and derivatives THEQ was launched on Mar 26, 2025 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.
